queue.title: Fix Onboarding/Signup Flow
queue.description: Critical bug: new users cannot sign up. Port 3000 auth server offline, /signup redirects to /signin, missing Sign Up button on login page. Checkpoint every 20 min to work-logs/.

milestones.title: Diagnose auth architecture
milestones.description: Check port 3000 server, understand auth flow, identify why /signup redirects

milestones.title: Fix routing and add Sign Up button
milestones.description: Repair /signup route, add Sign Up button to login page, ensure flow works end-to-end

queue.title: Draft Royalty Collection Knowledge Schema
queue.description: Comprehensive schema for PROs (BMI, ASCAP, SESAC), SoundExchange, MLC, distributor workflows. Includes entity relationships, TypeScript models, business rules, state machines.

milestones.title: Research and document royalty sources
milestones.description: Map all royalty streams: PROs, SoundExchange, MLC, distributors, mechanicals. Document timing rules and critical deadlines.

milestones.title: Design data models
milestones.description: Create TypeScript interfaces for RoyaltyProfile, RegistrationStatus, PaymentStream, SplitSheet, etc.

milestones.title: Define business logic rules
milestones.description: State machines for registration workflows, validation rules, timing constraints, distributor migration logic

queue.title: Implement Royalty Registration Checklist UI
queue.description: Build onboarding checklist for PRO, SoundExchange, MLC, copyright registration. Include progress tracking and release gating.
